incidents.incident_title: ANOMALY: Operational delay for Train 12301 near Kanpur Central
incidents.situation_summary: Train 12301 (Howrah Rajdhani Express) is delayed by 45 minutes near Kanpur Central due to line congestion and traffic slot scheduling constraints.
incidents.reroute_plan: Dijkstra Detour via secondary corridor line to bypass slot congestion at Kanpur Central
incidents.maintenance_task: Perform routine check on line switches and signaling points at Kanpur Central junction yards.
incidents.operations_task: Coordinate slot re-allocation with control room. Permit express overtake if possible.
incidents.station_manager_task: Announce delay of 45 minutes for Train 12301 Howrah Rajdhani Express arriving on platform.
incidents.passenger_sms: [RailMind Alert] Train 12301 is running late by 45 minutes near Kanpur Central.

incidents.reroute_plan: Dijkstra Detour via secondary corridor line to bypass slot congestion at Bhopal
incidents.maintenance_task: Perform routine check on line switches and signaling points at Bhopal junction yards.
incidents.operations_task: Coordinate slot re-allocation with control room. Permit express overtake if possible.
incidents.station_manager_task: Announce delay of 22 minutes for Train 12951 Mumbai Rajdhani Express arriving on platform.
incidents.passenger_sms: [RailMind Alert] Train 12951 is running late by 22 minutes near Bhopal.
